'''famushu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oaktree|oaktree]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-m-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oaktree|oaktree]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| famushu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæmishith|fæmishith]] || [[word:fæmishij|fæmishij]] || [[word:fæmishish|fæmishish]] || [[word:fæmishi|fæmishi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:famumushuth|famumushuth]] || [[word:famumushuj|famumushuj]] || [[word:famumushush|famumushush]] || [[word:famumushu|famumushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:famushuth|famushuth]] || [[word:famushuj|famushuj]] || [[word:famushush|famushush]] || [[word:famushu|famushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:famufshuth|famufshuth]] || [[word:famufshuj|famufshuj]] || [[word:famufshush|famufshush]] || [[word:famufshuf|famufshuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:famushuthu|famushuthu]] || [[word:famushuju|famushuju]] || [[word:famushushu|famushushu]] || [[word:famushuku|famushuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:famushuth|famushuth]] || [[word:famushuj|famushuj]] || [[word:famushush|famushush]] || [[word:famushu|famushu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:famushuthul|famushuthul]] || [[word:famushujul|famushujul]] || [[word:famushushul|famushushul]] || [[word:famushukul|famushukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:famushuthuthu|famushuthuthu]] || [[word:famushujuju|famushujuju]] || [[word:famushushushu|famushushushu]] || [[word:famushuku|famushuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:famushuthun|famushuthun]] || [[word:famushujun|famushujun]] || [[word:famushushun|famushushun]] || [[word:famushukun|famushukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:famushuthuoro|famushuthuoro]] || [[word:famushujuoro|famushujuoro]] || [[word:famushushuoro|famushushuoro]] || [[word:famushukuoro|famushukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
